headline: Northrop Grumman Extends Autonomy And Propulsion Reach With DARPA And Australia
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) has started flight tests of its XRQ-73 SHEPARD uncrewed aircraft for DARPA, marking a key step for hybrid-electric propulsion in military aviation. The company has been formally engaged by the Australian government to establish domestic solid rocket motor production, expanding its role in allied missile and propulsion supply chains. For investors tracking defense and aerospace, these updates highlight where Northrop Grumman is applying engineering and program...
